race.comment: ANCHO (2) building a good winning CV and can keep the winning momentum going in this similar contest. Up slightly in weight for this after scoring a comfortable victory over 1500m at Albury. Should be a rinse and repeat here. BELNERA (6) consistent mare with her hoof on the till. Launched late from back in the field with a desperately unlucky second over 1500m at Albury. Leading player again with the strong tempo. BOMERTON (12) struggling to draw a decent gate and today is no different. Returned good closing splits with a respectable sixth over 1300m at Wagga. Looking for this trip now and adept in all conditions. Each way. DOUBTFREE (13) has been thereabouts in his last two. Doesn't win out of turn but gets the key booking of Boudvillain. Have to keep in mind.
